CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2009 Continued To Dec-08-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Aug-18-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Christopher Keane, Esq. appeared with petitioner Evelyn Pratt, a/k/a Evelyn Gayfield, who was present as Guardian ad litem for the minor Timothy Clay Lantzy, Jr., who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $450,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $101,108.99.
Medical Expenses - $45,564.02.
Costs - $8,675.20.

The net balance of $294,651.79 shall be distributed as follows: $94,651.79 shall be deposited into a Special Needs Trust/Blocked Account with Bank of America, located at 10607 Folsom Boulevard, Rancho Cordova, CA 95670-4840. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years. The remaining $200,000.00 shall be made payable to New York Life Insurance Company for the purchase of a structured settlement as described in Attachment 12 of the Order Approving the Compromise.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
